title: KZ-2 eliminate SSOT duplicates
objective:
Run script:
"""
state_in = Path('governance/state/KZ2_SSOT_DUPLICATES_INVENTORY.json')
inv = json.loads(state_in.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if state_in.exists() else {'duplicates': {}}
duplicates = inv.get('duplicates', {})
archive_root = Path('governance/archive/ssot_duplicates_2026-06-04')
archive_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
kept = []
moved = []
for key, files in duplicates.items():
    ordered = sorted(files)
    if not ordered:
        continue
    keep = ordered[0]
    kept.append(keep)
    for src in ordered[1:]:
        p = Path(src)
        if not p.exists():
            continue
        target = archive_root / p.name
        n = 1
        while target.exists():
            target = archive_root / (p.stem + '_' + str(n) + p.suffix)
            n = n + 1
        p.rename(target)
        changed_files.append(str(p))
        changed_files.append(str(target))
        moved.append({'from': str(p), 'to': str(target), 'group': key})
status = 'completed' if len(moved) > 0 or len(duplicates) == 0 else 'blocked'
status_obj = {'status':'PASS' if status == 'completed' else 'BLOCKED','all_valid': status == 'completed','duplicate_groups_before': len(duplicates),'duplicates_moved': len(moved),'kept': kept,'moved': moved,'archive_root': str(archive_root),'workflow_files_touched': False}
status_path = Path('governance/state/kz2_ssot_status.json')
status_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
status_path.write_text(json.dumps(status_obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(status_path))
state = Path('governance/state/KZ2_ELIMINATE_SSOT_DUPLICATES.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'KZ-2','trace_id':'kz2_eliminate_ssot_duplicates','status':status,'release_pass':False,'inventory_sha':'93ed838d8e885069ea634154f3ee240b5170c70e','duplicates_moved':len(moved),'kz2_ssot_status':str(status_path),'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'KZ-2B record KZ-2 result and activate KZ-4'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/KZ2_ELIMINATE_SSOT_DUPLICATES.md')
report.write_text('# KZ-2 | Eliminate SSOT duplicates\nStatus: ' + status + '\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\n## Input\nInventory SHA: 93ed838d8e885069ea634154f3ee240b5170c70e\n\n## Result\nDuplicate groups before: ' + str(len(duplicates)) + '\nDuplicates moved: ' + str(len(moved)) + '\nArchive root: ' + str(archive_root) + '\n\n## Status file\n`governance/state/kz2_ssot_status.json`\n\nWorkflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.\n\nNext: KZ-2B record KZ-2 result and activate KZ-4.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
